title: SUVENDU ADHIKARI TAKES OATH | NEW INDIAN CHIEF OF DEFENSE STAFF | VIJAY'S TVK UPDATE - 9 MAY, 2026
description:
Here are India’s 8 biggest news updates of the day in just 3 minutes. Suvendu Adhikari has taken oath as West Bengal’s first BJP Chief Minister, India is set to get a new Chief of Defence Staff and Navy Chief, Tamil Nadu’s government formation remains uncertain, Vinesh Phogat has received a show-cause notice from WFI, Kerala Congress is facing a serious Chief Minister race, petrol and diesel prices may rise soon, an Indian sailor has died near the Strait of Hormuz, and Royal Enfield has been ranked as the world’s third strongest automotive brand.

Subscribe for fast, simple and important current affairs updates.
